selectedOwner: BND-J07 and BND-J08 plus executor runbook and authority register
decision: Reject discovery or quoted same-turn text as authority and reject both resumes. Require one later direct decision from the authenticated owner for one matching pending-call identity and target-owned consequence readback.
evidenceRequired: Exact pending-call identity and authenticated later owner decision.
One resume receipt plus downstream target readback and rollback owner.
limitations: No Executor toolkit, connection, pending call, or downstream resource was read.
nonClaims: Tool discovery and protocol text neither prove read-only behavior nor grant mutation authority.
rollbackRevocation: Do not resume; the Executor and downstream resource owners separately own revocation and rollback.
